title: Assistant/Creative Director
description:
Our Client

The Talent People is representing our client, a prominent, fast-growing Advertising Agency in Singapore that is reshaping how brands connect with modern audiences. With a strong focus on creativity, cultural relevance, and community‑driven storytelling, our client partners with leading brands to deliver impactful, insight‑led campaigns across digital and social ecosystems.

About The Role

As the Creative Strategy Director, you will lead the organization’s strategic and creative evolution — shaping influence‑driven ideas, guiding cross‑functional teams, and elevating the company’s creative thinking. You will play a central role in developing culturally attuned strategies, crafting compelling narratives, and driving integrated campaigns where creators and communities sit at the heart of every concept.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Define and lead the creative strategy function, setting frameworks that guide campaign thinking across teams.

  • Translate audience insights, cultural trends, and brand objectives into influence‑led creative concepts and integrated campaign narratives.

  • Partner closely with business development, account management, and creator‑facing teams to ensure strategic alignment and cohesive storytelling.

  • Craft compelling decks, narratives, and presentations that elevate pitch quality and improve win rates.

  • Stay ahead of social, cultural, and digital trends to ensure ideas remain relevant, timely, and resonant.

  • Mentor teams to strengthen their strategic thinking, creative articulation, and storytelling abilities.

  • Contribute to the organization's external reputation by championing influence‑driven creativity and cultural insight.

Experience Required:

  • 8–15 years in creative strategy, brand strategy, or integrated marketing.
  • Experience in social‑first, digital‑led, or hybrid creative environments.
  • Proven track record of campaigns where creators or communities shaped the core idea.
  • Strong storytelling, deck‑crafting, and client‑facing presentation skills.
  • Ability to bridge strategy, creativity, and cultural insight in a cohesive way.
  • Experience leading cross‑functional teams and guiding creative development.
  • Strong understanding of social platforms, digital behavior, and cultural trends.
  • Coming from a Creative Marketing Agency is highly desirable

Education/Qualification

  • A relevant tertiary qualification in Business, Marketing, or any related field.

  • Additional certifications or training in insurance or sales will be a plus.

Why This Role?

This is a rare opportunity to shape the next chapter of a company’s creative evolution. You will be the strategic anchor driving influence‑led creativity, building new capabilities, and delivering campaigns that shape culture and business outcomes. If you are a visionary strategist with a builder mindset and a passion for culturally relevant storytelling, we’d love to hear from you!

The Talent People 24C2589

postedCompany.description:
𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗧𝗮𝗹𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗣𝗲𝗼𝗽𝗹𝗲 specializes in providing customized and strategic talent solutions, with our services extending from project-based to permanent placement. Our goal is to enhance the hiring process by providing flexible and tailored solutions to tackle the talent crunch that businesses face in a highly competitive and globalized world. 

Our mission is simple:   

"To deliver at the 𝗿𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁 𝘁𝗶𝗺𝗲, the 𝗿𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁 𝗧𝗮𝗹𝗲𝗻𝘁, 𝗼𝗻 𝗱𝗲𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗱. "  

Reach us at 𝗰𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗮𝗰𝘁@𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘁𝗮𝗹𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗽𝗲𝗼𝗽𝗹𝗲.𝗰𝗼, or visit us at 𝗵𝘁𝘁𝗽𝘀://𝗧𝗵𝗲𝗧𝗮𝗹𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗣𝗲𝗼𝗽𝗹𝗲.𝗰𝗼 for more information.
